concept.headline: TypeScript type annotations make value intent explicit.
concept.explanation: Primitive and union types help prevent invalid operations before runtime.

demo.intro: Declare typed values and a union id.

explanation.misconception: number includes ints/floats in JS runtime
Union still restricts to listed options only
Runtime output does not include TS type metadata

prediction.question:
Is this valid?

let id: string | number = true;
prediction.explanation: boolean is not part of string | number union.

explanation.afterDemo: Good type modeling catches wrong assignments early.

practice.prompt: Create typed values title:string, count:number, done:boolean and print them.

retryHints: Print all values in one line
